caption: A man with a shaved head, wearing a blue t-shirt with the logo "exel" and an identification badge around his neck, stands on a stage. He is positioned in front of a blue backlit screen featuring the text "has geek" and "#### rootconf". A black podium is situated to his right. Initially, the man stands still, facing toward the left side of the frame. As the scene progresses, he remains in place, maintaining his posture and gaze. In the final sequence, he shifts his position and reaches up with his right hand to touch the back of his head or neck while looking slightly downward and to the side. The background remains consistent throughout, with the "has geek" and "#### rootconf" branding clearly visible on the blue digital display behind him.
